# simdecisions — Machine-Readable Repository Summary

## Overview
Full-stack discrete event simulation platform with AI agent coordination system.

## Author
Dave Eichler
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/daaaave-atx
GitHub: DAAAAVE-ATX

## Tech Stack
- Backend: Python 3.12+, FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, PostgreSQL
- Frontend: React 18+, TypeScript, Vite
- Deployment: Railway (backend), Vercel (frontend)
- Auth: JWT, cross-app SSO via hodeia.me

## Key Components
- hivenode/: FastAPI backend, factory runner, remote management
- simdecisions/: DES engine, Phase-IR loader, optimization
- browser/: React frontend, pane-based shell
- hodeia_auth/: Auth service, OAuth provider
- _tools/: Dev tooling, inventory CLI

## Working Systems
- Factory Loop: scheduler + dispatcher + queue runner (17+ specs processed)
- DES Engine: Discrete event simulation with checkpoints
- Phase-IR Loader: Flow validation and execution
- Hive Coordination: AI agent task dispatch and response collection
- Build Monitor: Live status dashboard
- Event Ledger: Append-only event log

## Hive System
- Q88N: Human sovereign (Dave)
- Q33NR: Queen Regent (live session, does NOT code)
- Q33N: Queen Coordinator (headless, does NOT code unless approved)
- BEEs: Workers (headless, code-writing agents)

## Source Access
All files in this portfolio are stubs. Contact Dave Eichler for full source code.

## Repository URL
https://github.com/DAAAAVE-ATX/simdecisions-portfolio
